summary: Verified removal of 'Documento de Identificação Anexado' section from the Cadastro details modal and confirmed the Documentos tab remains fully intact. All Playwright assertions passed end-to-end.
critical_code_review_comments: admin-extras.js: renderDocCard function (lines 408-441) is now dead code since both call sites were removed from openDetailsModal. Recommend removing the function and its associated CSS (lines 60-76) to keep the file lean.
Bind block for .adm-doc-btn click handlers (lines 526-534) is also dead code because no .adm-doc-btn is rendered inside the cadastro modal anymore. Safe to delete.
The dataUrlToBlob + handleDocAction helpers remain only for the old modal flow; they can be removed unless reused by the new Documentos tab (which uses its own download anchor instead).
seed_data_creation: None — used pre-seeded CPFs 11111111101 (MARIA, RG), 22222222202 (JOÃO, CNH), 33333333303 (ANA, Passaporte). Nothing created or deleted.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cadastro details modal at /donaspainel/#/cadastro renders exactly 5 h4 sections in order: Resumo, Dados Pessoais, Endereço, Contatos, Documentos. The Documentos section is now strictly text rows (RG/Data RG/Órgão/UF/CPF) — no thumbnail/document card. The Documentos tab at /#/documentos continues to show 4 stat cards (Total=3, RG=1, CNH=1, Passaporte=1), 3 rows for the seeded CPFs, and preview modal with 'Ver frente'/'Ver verso' buttons works. Login note: on the login page the user input has no [type], so iterate inputs and skip the [type=password] one; click button by role/name 'Entrar' (the eye-toggle inside the password field is a button and matches generic selectors first).
rca of the issue: N/A — feature change verified working as specified.
